featured.headline: OPEN BETA
featured.title: Guess the hidden character pixel by pixel.
featured.subtitle: Pick a category, reveal the pixels, and compete on the global leaderboard.

apps.name: Pixel Guess
apps.subtitle: Guess the character behind the pixels
apps.description: An engaging web game where players identify pixelated images from categories like League of Legends, Valorant, and Demon Slayer.
apps.longDescription: Pixel Guess is a guessing game where you reveal hidden characters pixel by pixel. Pick a category, choose Easy or Hard difficulty, and try to identify the character before the image is fully revealed. Track your streak, compete on global leaderboards, and challenge yourself across multiple categories. Supports 12 languages.
features: Multiple categories: LoL, Valorant, Demon Slayer and more

apps.name: Pixel Guess Mobile
apps.subtitle: Pixel guessing game for iOS & Android
apps.description: The mobile version of Pixel Guess — guess pixelated characters on your phone with smooth animations and native performance.
apps.longDescription: Pixel Guess Mobile brings the pixel guessing experience to iOS and Android. Built with Expo and React Native, it features smooth Skia-powered animations, multiple game categories, Easy and Hard difficulty modes, streak tracking, global leaderboards, and confetti celebrations on correct guesses. Search characters with smart autocomplete and compete with players worldwide.
features: Native iOS app built with Expo

apps.name: Hono Telescope
apps.subtitle: Monitoring dashboard for Hono apps
apps.description: An open-source monitoring and debugging tool for Hono applications. Real-time dashboard to inspect requests, exceptions, logs, and database queries.
apps.longDescription: Hono Telescope provides a real-time dashboard for Hono applications running on Node.js and Bun. Middleware-based setup gives you instant visibility into API requests with URL, method, response time, and status codes. Tracks unhandled exceptions with stack traces, collects console logs tied to request context, and monitors database queries from Prisma, Sequelize, MongoDB, and Bun SQLite with execution times.
features: Real-time request monitoring with response times
Log viewer tied to request context
Database query logging for Prisma, Sequelize, MongoDB
